Request a demo

Visitor Management

Know exactly who enters your facility — and when they leave.

Every visitor, every contractor, every delivery — logged, verified, and traceable. SYAG Visitor Management replaces the paper visitor book with a digital system that works the way your facility already operates.

Visitors arrive ready. No queues at the gate.

Residents and staff can pre-register visitors from the web portal or mobile app. SYAG generates a unique QR pass and sends it directly to the visitor via WhatsApp or SMS.

At the gate:

The guard scans the QR code with the SYAG app. Visitor identity is confirmed instantly. Access is approved or denied in under 10 seconds. No radio calls. No paper forms.

QR pass contains

  • Visitor name and ID reference
  • Approved entry window (date and time range)
  • Host name and unit number
  • Vehicle registration (if applicable)
  • Single-use or multi-use setting
  • Auto-expiry after the approved window

A complete record of every visit

Every visit generates a timestamped entry and exit record:

  • Time of arrival (when QR was scanned at entry)
  • Time of departure (when QR was scanned at exit)
  • Gate used
  • Guard who processed the visit
  • Any notes or flags added during the visit

Full visit history per resident, per unit, and per visitor — searchable and exportable.

Know when a visitor hasn't left

If a visitor's approved window expires and they haven't checked out, SYAG flags the overstay automatically.

  • Configurable grace period per visit type (e.g. 30 minutes for deliveries, 2 hours for social visits)
  • Supervisor receives push notification when overstay threshold is reached
  • Overstay appears in the active incidents view
  • Guard can be dispatched to investigate

Flagged individuals. Instant alerts.

Maintain a facility blacklist for individuals who are not permitted entry — banned contractors, former residents, or individuals flagged by authorities.

  • Add individuals to the blacklist with reason and supporting documentation
  • When a pre-registration is submitted for a blacklisted individual, the approving admin is alerted before entry is granted
  • If a blacklisted individual presents at the gate, the guard is alerted immediately on scan
  • Blacklist entries can be set to expire (time-limited bans) or permanent

Contractor access without the paperwork

  • Define the approved work period (dates and times)
  • Specify approved access zones within the facility
  • Generate QR passes for all contractor personnel on the job
  • Passes auto-expire at the end of the approved period
  • Contractor visit history maintained for compliance and insurance purposes

See visitor management in your facility.
